process-1._comment: Process node (renamed from synthos-pi-retail in 2026-05-14 hardware refactor). Ingestion + MQTT broker + dispatcher.

trader-1._comment: Trader node (10.0.0.168 confirmed 2026-05-14 by heartbeat). Stateless trader_server only. Cutover to live trading: 2026-05-15.

pi2w-monitor._comment: Pi Zero 2W sentinel. Offline since 2026-05-14 pending redeploy; IP placeholder.
